doctrineNotes: Comparison-and-fit framework. Never claim hands-on use; cite manufacturer specs, verified-buyer reviews, and independent sources (Aquarium Co-Op, Prime Time Aquatics) as third-party evidence. No em dashes. No defensive audience exclusions. Visual identity is FUN: bright aquatic palette (aqua blues + greens with a warm coral pop), playful rounded shapes, bubbles, friendly rounded type. The opposite of clinical lab-equipment review sites; keep body copy readable, the fun lives in palette/shapes/motifs.
